project.name: Project Atlas
project.summary: Project Atlas is a strategic initiative to modernize the core platform infrastructure, enabling faster feature delivery and improved system reliability. The team has completed the foundational architecture phase and is now executing on the migration of key services. Overall progress remains on track with strong momentum in Q2.

milestones.title: Architecture Approval
milestones.description: Technical design review and architecture sign-off by engineering leadership.

milestones.title: Core API Migration
milestones.description: Migration of all core REST APIs to the new platform framework.

milestones.title: Data Layer Cutover
milestones.description: Transition primary data storage to the new distributed database cluster.

milestones.title: Performance Validation
milestones.description: Load testing and performance benchmarking against SLA targets. Dependency on infra team capacity.

milestones.title: GA Release
milestones.description: General availability release to all production tenants.

shipped.title: API Gateway v2
shipped.description: Deployed the new API gateway with improved rate limiting, circuit breaker patterns, and request routing. Achieved 99.97% uptime in the first 30 days.

shipped.title: Authentication Service Rewrite
shipped.description: Replaced legacy OAuth implementation with a modern token-based authentication service supporting SSO and MFA. Reduced auth latency by 60%.

shipped.title: Monitoring Dashboard
shipped.description: Launched a real-time operational dashboard with SLA tracking, alerting, and historical trend analysis for all core services.

shipped.title: CI/CD Pipeline Modernization
shipped.description: Migrated all build and deployment pipelines to the new orchestration platform, cutting average deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes.

inProgress.title: Database Schema Migration
inProgress.description: Migrating 47 database schemas to the new distributed cluster. Currently processing batch 3 of 5 with zero-downtime rolling updates.

inProgress.title: Service Mesh Implementation
inProgress.description: Deploying service mesh sidecar proxies across all microservices for improved observability, traffic management, and mTLS.

inProgress.title: Client SDK Update
inProgress.description: Updating the public client SDK to support the new API contracts. Documentation and code samples in progress.

inProgress.title: Load Testing Framework
inProgress.description: Building an automated load testing framework to validate performance against target SLAs before GA release.

carriedOver.title: Legacy API Deprecation
carriedOver.description: Formal deprecation and sunset plan for v1 APIs. Carried over due to partner team dependencies requiring extended migration timelines.

carriedOver.title: Disaster Recovery Runbook
carriedOver.description: Comprehensive DR runbook and automated failover testing. Deferred from March due to team capacity constraints during the core migration push.
